extraction.one_line_summary: YATES Simon attacked from breakaway inside 3km on Gran Sasso d'Italia summit finish, dropped PINOT and CHAVES in final kilometer
tactical_patterns: YATES first time showing at race front entire stage, timed single acceleration perfectly inside 1km to summit
BALLERINI David won intermediate sprint from breakaway despite being second-year pro, outsprinted experienced BELKOV
MASNADA Fausto pushed solo attacks on climb but cracked 2.8km from summit after overextending early
FROOME Chris already requiring radio communication on medium mountain, suffered 1+ minute loss signaling deeper GC collapse

rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: showed elite summit finish timing by staying hidden until final kilometer, then decisive acceleration
rider_signals.FROOME Chris: negative: radio communication mid-climb and 1+ minute loss on medium-difficulty stage signals race-ending form crisis
rider_signals.BALLERINI David: positive: outsprinted experienced BELKOV in breakaway intermediate despite being only second-year professional at 22
rider_signals.MASNADA Fausto: negative: strong early KOM push but tactical error attacking too far out, cracked 2.8km from finish
rider_signals.CHAVES Esteban: positive: only rider seated in final quartet before Yates attack, demonstrating superior efficiency under pressure
